_meta.description: Unified machine-readable index of every SLASHED design token and class, with categories, descriptions, stability tiers and bundle membership. Generated from source — do not edit by hand (run: npm run docs:api).

schema.name: Element identifier (token custom-property name incl. leading --, or class name without leading dot).
schema.tier: Stability tier: PUBLIC | PUBLIC-ADVANCED | INTERNAL (see docs/architecture.md).
schema.role: TOKEN: 'knob' (input you set — a literal primitive) or 'consumption' (output you read — derived from other tokens via var(--sf-…)). Orthogonal to tier; no SemVer meaning.
schema.category: High-level, human-facing area derived from the source file.
schema.area: Short machine slug for the area (core, layout, macros, states, forms, …).
schema.group: Finer-grained section, derived from the nearest section-banner comment in source.
schema.description: Documentation hint derived from section-banner / attached comments (may be empty).
schema.sourceFiles: Array of source CSS files that declare the element.
schema.layer: The CSS @layer the element lives in (e.g. slashed.layout).
schema.bundles: Array of bundle tiers that ship the element (optimal, full).
schema.optional: True when the element ships from optional/ (not core).
schema.namespace: TOKEN: second name segment, a filterable facet (color, space, font, radius, shadow, …).
schema.value: TOKEN: default/declared value (last declaration wins; @property initial-value when registered).
schema.aliasOf: TOKEN: target token when value is exactly one var(--sf-x) reference, else null.
schema.kind: CLASS: element family (layout, macro, state, accessibility, motion, print, form, component, theme).
schema.isVariant: CLASS: true when it is a BEM modifier (contains --).
schema.baseClass: CLASS: the base class name when isVariant, else null.

entries.name: --sf-alternate-gap
entries.description: Gap between items in the alternating zigzag layout.

entries.name: --sf-alternate-inner-gap
entries.description: Gap between content and media within each zigzag item.

entries.name: --sf-animation-blink
entries.description: Blinking visibility loop. Use for cursor indicators or critical attention cues. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
entries.value: sf-blink calc(1s * var(--sf-motion-scale)) steps(1, end) infinite

entries.name: --sf-animation-color-pulse
entries.description: Pulsing color loop. Use for live-status badges (recording, live). Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

entries.name: --sf-animation-fade-in
entries.description: Fade-in entrance animation shorthand. Use directly as animation property value.

entries.name: --sf-animation-fade-out
entries.description: Fade-out exit animation shorthand.

entries.name: --sf-animation-float
entries.description: Gentle floating / levitating loop. Use for hero illustrations or floating UI elements. Decorative — disable for prefers-reduced-motion.

entries.name: --sf-animation-ping
entries.description: Expanding ping / ripple loop. Use for notification badges and live-indicator dots.

entries.name: --sf-animation-scale-down
entries.description: Scale-down exit animation. Pairs with --sf-animation-scale-up for enter/leave transitions.

entries.name: --sf-animation-scale-up
entries.description: Scale-up entrance animation. Use for modals, popovers, and tooltips appearing.

entries.name: --sf-animation-shimmer
entries.description: Shimmer / skeleton-loading sweep. Apply on placeholder elements while content loads.

entries.name: --sf-animation-slide-in-down
entries.description: Slide-in from above. Use for dropdown menus and top-attached sheets.

entries.name: --sf-animation-slide-in-left
entries.description: Slide-in from the left. Use for left-side drawers and navigation panels.

entries.name: --sf-animation-slide-in-right
entries.description: Slide-in from the right. Use for right-side drawers and detail panels.

entries.name: --sf-animation-slide-in-up
entries.description: Slide-in from below. Use for bottom sheets, toasts, and floating action buttons.

entries.name: --sf-animation-slide-out-down
entries.description: Ready-made animation shorthand: slides the element out downward (sf-slide-out-down) at the normal duration with ease-in.

entries.name: --sf-animation-slide-out-left
entries.description: Ready-made animation shorthand: slides the element out to the left (sf-slide-out-left) at the normal duration with ease-in.

entries.name: --sf-animation-slide-out-right
entries.description: Ready-made animation shorthand: slides the element out to the right (sf-slide-out-right) at the normal duration with ease-in.

entries.name: --sf-animation-slide-out-up
entries.description: Ready-made animation shorthand: slides the element out upward (sf-slide-out-up) at the normal duration with ease-in.

entries.name: --sf-animation-spin
entries.description: Continuous rotation loop. Use for loading spinners and progress indicators.

entries.name: --sf-aspect
entries.description: Aspect ratio value for the .aspect-ratio macro.

entries.name: --sf-bento-cols-default
entries.description: Default column count for the bento grid.

entries.name: --sf-bento-gap
entries.description: Gap between bento grid cells.

entries.name: --sf-bento-row-compact
entries.description: Row height for compact-variant bento items.

entries.name: --sf-bento-row-default
entries.description: Default row height for standard bento grid cells.

entries.name: --sf-bento-row-tall
entries.description: Tall row height for visually prominent or hero bento cells.

entries.name: --sf-bg-layer-fit
entries.description: object-fit applied to .sf-bg-layer when used as a bare media element, and to .sf-bg-layer > img / video / picture children. Defaults to cover.

entries.name: --sf-bg-layer-inset
entries.description: Inset from every edge of the parent. A single length applied uniformly; the layer size is derived from it so a non-zero inset still fills correctly.

entries.name: --sf-bg-layer-position
entries.description: object-position controlling where the media is anchored within the layer. Defaults to center (50% 50%).

entries.name: --sf-bg-layer-radius
entries.description: border-radius applied to the .sf-bg-layer layer and its img/video/picture children. Defaults to 0; set to match the parent's radius when clipping is needed.

entries.name: --sf-bg-layer-z
entries.description: z-index of the background layer. Defaults to -2 so it sits behind sibling content but above the parent's own background.

entries.name: --sf-blur
entries.description: Backdrop-filter blur amount for frosted-glass surfaces (navbars, overlays, dialogs). Default 12px. Pair with a semi-transparent background.

entries.name: --sf-body-color
entries.description: Text color for body copy. Alias of --sf-color-text. Override here to deviate body text from the global text color.

entries.name: --sf-body-em-style
entries.description: font-style for <em> inside body text (italic by default). Override to suppress italics if your typeface has no italic variant.

entries.name: --sf-body-font-family
entries.description: Font family for body text. Alias of --sf-font-body.

entries.name: --sf-body-font-size
entries.description: Base font size for body paragraphs. Alias of --sf-text-m.

entries.name: --sf-body-font-weight
entries.description: Font weight for body text. Alias of --sf-font-weight-body.

entries.name: --sf-body-line-height
entries.description: Line height for body paragraphs. Alias of --sf-leading-normal.

entries.name: --sf-body-strong-weight
entries.description: Font weight for <strong> inside body text. Override to choose a specific weight instead of inheriting bold.

entries.name: --sf-body-text-wrap
entries.description: text-wrap mode for body paragraphs. 'pretty' prevents orphaned last words; 'balance' equalises line lengths.

entries.name: --sf-border
entries.description: Default border shorthand (width + solid + color). Apply directly to border property.

entries.name: --sf-border-scale
entries.description: Global border-width multiplier. Set to 0 for borderless UI; 0.5 for hairline-only; 2 to double all border widths across the system.

entries.name: --sf-border-strong
entries.description: Strong-emphasis border shorthand.

entries.name: --sf-border-style
entries.description: Global border-style default applied across all border tokens.

entries.name: --sf-border-subtle
entries.description: Low-contrast subtle border shorthand.

entries.name: --sf-border-width-1
entries.description: Standard 1px border width.

entries.name: --sf-border-width-2
entries.description: Medium 2px border width. Common for focus outlines.

entries.name: --sf-border-width-3
entries.description: Thick 3px border width.

entries.name: --sf-border-width-4
entries.description: Extra-thick 4px border width for decorative borders.

entries.name: --sf-border-width-hairline
entries.description: 1px border width (hairline).

entries.name: --sf-box-border-color
entries.description: Border color for the box layout primitive.

entries.name: --sf-box-border-width
entries.description: Border width for the box layout primitive.

entries.name: --sf-box-padding
entries.description: Inner padding for the box layout primitive.

entries.name: --sf-breakout-width
entries.description: Width of full-bleed breakout elements inside a content grid.

entries.name: --sf-btn-border-width
entries.description: Border thickness for .sf-btn (used by all fill, outline, and secondary treatments).

entries.name: --sf-btn-font-scale
entries.description: Uniform label-size multiplier for .sf-btn — scales every size's font-size by one factor while keeping the xs…xl ladder intact. The everyday 'bigger/smaller button text' knob.

entries.name: --sf-btn-font-size
entries.description: Flatten-all label font-size for .sf-btn — once set it overrides every size (--xs/--s/--l/--xl) to the same value. For proportional sizing use --sf-btn-font-scale; to retune a single rung use --sf-btn-{size}-font-size.

entries.name: --sf-btn-font-weight
entries.description: Label font-weight for .sf-btn. Defaults to the interactive weight.

entries.name: --sf-btn-gap
entries.description: Gap between an icon and the label inside .sf-btn.

entries.name: --sf-btn-l-font-size
entries.description: Label font-size for the large button (.sf-btn--l). Unset, falls through to --sf-text-l; set to retune this rung without touching the others.

entries.name: --sf-btn-l-min-height
entries.description: Minimum target height for the large button (.sf-btn--l). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-l-padding-block
entries.description: Vertical (block) padding for the large button (.sf-btn--l). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-l-padding-inline
entries.description: Horizontal (inline) padding for the large button (.sf-btn--l). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-m-font-size
entries.description: Label font-size for the default (medium) button (.sf-btn). Unset, falls through to --sf-text-m; set to retune this rung without touching the others.

entries.name: --sf-btn-m-min-height
entries.description: Minimum target height for the default (medium) button (.sf-btn). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-m-padding-block
entries.description: Vertical (block) padding for the default (medium) button (.sf-btn). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-m-padding-inline
entries.description: Horizontal (inline) padding for the default (medium) button (.sf-btn). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-min-height
entries.description: Flatten-all minimum target height for .sf-btn — once set it overrides every size to the same value. For per-rung control use --sf-btn-{size}-min-height.

entries.name: --sf-btn-padding-block
entries.description: Flatten-all vertical (block) padding for .sf-btn — once set it overrides every size to the same value. For per-rung control use --sf-btn-{size}-padding-block.

entries.name: --sf-btn-padding-inline
entries.description: Flatten-all horizontal (inline) padding for .sf-btn — once set it overrides every size to the same value. For per-rung control use --sf-btn-{size}-padding-inline.

entries.name: --sf-btn-radius
entries.description: Corner radius for .sf-btn. Defaults to --sf-radius-m; gives buttons a distinct radius from form fields without touching global tokens.

entries.name: --sf-btn-s-font-size
entries.description: Label font-size for the small button (.sf-btn--s). Unset, falls through to --sf-text-s; set to retune this rung without touching the others.

entries.name: --sf-btn-s-min-height
entries.description: Minimum target height for the small button (.sf-btn--s). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-s-padding-block
entries.description: Vertical (block) padding for the small button (.sf-btn--s). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-s-padding-inline
entries.description: Horizontal (inline) padding for the small button (.sf-btn--s). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-xl-font-size
entries.description: Label font-size for the extra-large button (.sf-btn--xl). Unset, falls through to --sf-text-xl; set to retune this rung without touching the others.

entries.name: --sf-btn-xl-min-height
entries.description: Minimum target height for the extra-large button (.sf-btn--xl). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-xl-padding-block
entries.description: Vertical (block) padding for the extra-large button (.sf-btn--xl). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-xl-padding-inline
entries.description: Horizontal (inline) padding for the extra-large button (.sf-btn--xl). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-xs-font-size
entries.description: Label font-size for the extra-small button (.sf-btn--xs). Unset, falls through to --sf-text-xs; set to retune this rung without touching the others.

entries.name: --sf-btn-xs-min-height
entries.description: Minimum target height for the extra-small button (.sf-btn--xs). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-xs-padding-block
entries.description: Vertical (block) padding for the extra-small button (.sf-btn--xs). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-btn-xs-padding-inline
entries.description: Horizontal (inline) padding for the extra-small button (.sf-btn--xs). Unset, falls through to that rung's scale default; set to retune this rung alone.

entries.name: --sf-card-avatar-size
entries.description: Diameter of .sf-card__avatar. Defaults to 2.5rem.

entries.name: --sf-card-bg
entries.description: Background surface for .sf-card. Defaults to --sf-color-surface.

entries.name: --sf-card-border-color
entries.description: Border colour for .sf-card. Defaults to --sf-color-border.

entries.name: --sf-card-border-width
entries.description: Border thickness for .sf-card.

entries.name: --sf-card-gap
entries.description: Divider spacing for .sf-card__header / __footer (padding + margin around the rule).

entries.name: --sf-card-heading-size
entries.description: Font-size for .sf-card__title. Defaults to --sf-text-xl.

entries.name: --sf-card-media-radius
entries.description: Corner radius for .sf-card__media. Mirrors the card's inner radius by default.

entries.name: --sf-card-media-ratio
entries.description: Aspect ratio for .sf-card__media. Defaults to --sf-ratio-video (16/9).

entries.name: --sf-card-padding
entries.description: Inner padding for .sf-card. Also feeds the concentric-radius math (outer = inner radius + padding).

entries.name: --sf-card-radius
entries.description: Inner radius for .sf-card children such as __media. Combined with padding to derive the outer radius.

entries.name: --sf-card-radius-outer
entries.description: Outer corner radius of .sf-card. Concentric with the inner radius: calc(--sf-card-radius + --sf-card-padding).

entries.name: --sf-card-shadow
entries.description: Base drop shadow for .sf-card. Defaults to --sf-shadow-s.

entries.name: --sf-card-shadow--elevated
entries.description: Drop shadow applied by the .sf-card--elevated modifier (border hidden, larger shadow).

entries.name: --sf-card-shadow--hover
entries.description: Drop shadow applied on hover/focus by the .sf-card--interactive modifier.

entries.name: --sf-caret-color
entries.description: Cursor caret color inside text inputs and contenteditable elements.

entries.name: --sf-center-gutter
entries.description: Minimum side gutter for the center layout.

entries.name: --sf-center-max
entries.description: Maximum width for the center layout.

entries.name: --sf-cluster-align
entries.description: Vertical alignment of cluster items (align-items value).

entries.name: --sf-cluster-gap
entries.description: Gap between wrapped inline items in the cluster layout.

entries.name: --sf-cluster-justify
entries.description: Horizontal justification of the cluster (justify-content value).

entries.name: --sf-code-font-size

entries.name: --sf-color-action
entries.description: Primary interactive color. Applied to filled buttons, active indicators, and brand accent surfaces.
entries.value: light-dark(var(--sf-color-action-source-light), var(--sf-color-action-source-dark, oklch(from var(--sf-color-action-source-light) clamp(0.65, calc(0.95 - l * 0.5), 0.88) calc(c * 0.9) h)))

entries.description: Action color at pressed/active brightness.

entries.name: --sf-color-action--hover
entries.description: Action color at hover brightness.

entries.name: --sf-color-action-100
entries.description: Very light action shade. Hover fills on white surfaces, badge backgrounds.

entries.name: --sf-color-action-200
entries.description: Light action shade. Subtle fills and outlined badge backgrounds.

entries.name: --sf-color-action-300

entries.name: --sf-color-action-500
entries.description: Mid action shade — the 'pure' hue. Accessible on both light and dark backgrounds.

entries.name: --sf-color-action-700
entries.description: Dark action shade. Strong text and icon fills on light backgrounds.

entries.name: --sf-color-action-800

entries.name: --sf-color-action-source-dark
entries.description: Registered <color> dark counterpart of --sf-color-action. Enables smooth CSS transitions when toggling between light and dark mode; without <color> registration the browser cannot interpolate and transitions snap at 50%.

entries.name: --sf-color-action-source-light
entries.description: OKLCH lightness source for the action color. Animate this to smoothly transition between light and dark brand themes.

entries.name: --sf-color-action-subtle

entries.name: --sf-color-action-superdark

entries.name: --sf-color-action-tint

entries.name: --sf-color-action-xdark

entries.name: --sf-color-base
entries.description: Mode-adaptive base surface color. Drives the page canvas and the surface elevation family; not an interactive/brand role.
entries.value: light-dark(var(--sf-color-base-source-light), var(--sf-color-base-source-dark, oklch(from var(--sf-color-base-source-light) clamp(0.16, calc(1.18 - l), 0.24) calc(c * 0.5) h)))

entries.name: --sf-color-base--active

entries.name: --sf-container-prose
entries.description: Prose max-width — optimised for readability (~75ch).

entries.name: --sf-container-wide
entries.description: Wide container for marketing / dashboard layouts (~1440px).

entries.name: --sf-content-gap
entries.description: Tight gap within related content (stack, flow, prose). Override globally to retune all tight primitives at once.

entries.name: --sf-content-intrinsic-size
entries.description: Intrinsic-size hint for content-visibility: auto (prevents layout shift on first reveal).

entries.name: --sf-content-width
entries.description: Max-width of the main content column in a content grid.

entries.name: --sf-contrast-bias
entries.description: Global text-contrast nudge. Positive values push derived reading-text colors toward the extremes (darker in light mode, lighter in dark). Default 0 (neutral).

entries.name: --sf-contrast-threshold
entries.description: OKLCH lightness crossover for auto-contrast on colored surfaces. Colors with L above this get dark text; below get light text. Default 0.6.

entries.name: --sf-cover-min-height
entries.description: Minimum height of the cover layout (typically 100svh).

entries.name: --sf-cover-padding
entries.description: Inner padding for the cover layout.

entries.name: --sf-current-font-weight
entries.description: Inherits the current font-weight from context. Useful as a reset.

entries.name: --sf-density
entries.description: Compact ↔ comfortable dial for interactive control geometry (the --sf-size-* rung ladder). Default 1; below 1 packs controls tighter (dashboards, data tables), above 1 loosens them. A deliberate design/user choice, not a viewport response — orthogonal to --sf-space-scale (whitespace) and --sf-section-scale (section rhythm). The --sf-touch-target accessibility floor is independent, so a small value can't shrink native controls below the WCAG target. Like the other global multipliers it is a :root dial (the size ladder is computed at :root and inherits, so nested overrides don't retroactively rescale it).

entries.name: --sf-display-l-line-height
entries.description: Line height for large display text (--sf-text-display-l). Very tight to avoid excessive gaps at oversized sizes.

entries.name: --sf-display-m-line-height
entries.description: Line height for medium display text (--sf-text-display-m).

entries.name: --sf-display-s-line-height
entries.description: Line height for small display text (--sf-text-display-s).

entries.name: --sf-divider-color
entries.description: Color of horizontal/vertical divider rules.

entries.name: --sf-divider-gap
entries.description: Spacing (margin) around divider elements.

entries.name: --sf-divider-style
entries.description: Border style of dividers.

entries.name: --sf-divider-width
entries.description: Stroke width of horizontal and vertical divider rules.

entries.name: --sf-drop-shadow-l
entries.description: Large CSS filter: drop-shadow for prominent illustrated or cut-out elements.
entries.value: drop-shadow(0 8px 16px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 2.5), 0.7)))

entries.name: --sf-drop-shadow-m
entries.description: Medium CSS filter: drop-shadow for elevated icons and card thumbnails.
entries.value: drop-shadow(0 4px 6px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 2), 0.7)))

entries.name: --sf-drop-shadow-s
entries.description: Small CSS filter: drop-shadow. Use filter (not box-shadow) for elements with transparent areas — SVGs, PNGs, cutout images.
entries.value: drop-shadow(0 1px 2px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 1.5), 0.7)))

entries.name: --sf-drop-shadow-xl
entries.description: Extra-large CSS filter: drop-shadow for hero-scale illustrated or cut-out elements.
entries.value: drop-shadow(0 16px 32px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 3), 0.7)))

entries.name: --sf-drop-shadow-xs
entries.description: Extra-small CSS filter: drop-shadow, for the subtlest depth on small icons and cutout images.
entries.value: drop-shadow(0 0.5px 1px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 1), 0.7)))

entries.name: --sf-duration-fast
entries.description: Fast duration (~150ms). Hover transitions, tooltip appear.

entries.name: --sf-duration-instant
entries.description: Near-instant duration (~100ms). Micro-interactions and cursor-follow effects.

entries.name: --sf-duration-none
entries.description: 0ms duration. Disables transitions (respects prefers-reduced-motion).

entries.name: --sf-duration-normal
entries.description: Normal duration (~250ms). Default for most transitions.

entries.name: --sf-duration-slow
entries.description: Slow duration (~400ms). Emphasis transitions, drawers.

entries.name: --sf-duration-slower
entries.description: Extra-slow duration (~600ms). Page-level enter/exit transitions.

entries.name: --sf-ease-bounce
entries.description: Bounce easing. Playful overshooting effect.

entries.name: --sf-ease-elastic
entries.description: Elastic easing. Spring-like overshooting effect.

entries.name: --sf-ease-in
entries.description: Accelerating easing. Use for elements leaving the viewport.

entries.name: --sf-ease-in-out
entries.description: Symmetric easing. Use for elements that move within the viewport.

entries.name: --sf-ease-linear
entries.description: Linear easing. Use for progress indicators and spinner rotations.

entries.name: --sf-ease-out
entries.description: Decelerating easing. Use for elements entering the viewport.

entries.name: --sf-ease-overshoot
entries.description: Subtle overshoot easing. Softer spring effect.

entries.name: --sf-ease-spring
entries.description: Spring easing. Natural physics-based motion.

entries.name: --sf-equal-gap
entries.description: Gap between equal columns.

entries.name: --sf-equal-min-col
entries.description: column-width floor for .sf-equal's flowing CSS multi-column layout (not a grid) — the browser won't go narrower than this.

entries.name: --sf-equal-rule-color
entries.description: column-rule color between .sf-equal's flowing columns.

entries.name: --sf-equal-rule-style
entries.description: column-rule style between .sf-equal's flowing columns.

entries.name: --sf-equal-rule-width
entries.description: column-rule width between .sf-equal's flowing columns. 0 (default) means no rule.

entries.name: --sf-field-block
entries.description: Vertical (block) padding inside form fields.

entries.name: --sf-field-padding-block
entries.description: Vertical (block) inner padding for form field inputs. Reserved for a future .sf-field class — declared but not yet consumed by any shipped rule.

entries.name: --sf-field-padding-inline
entries.description: Horizontal (inline) inner padding for form field inputs. Reserved for a future .sf-field class — declared but not yet consumed by any shipped rule.

entries.name: --sf-field-radius
entries.description: Border radius for form field inputs. Defaults to --sf-radius-m; override to reshape all inputs at once. Reserved for a future .sf-field class — declared but not yet consumed by any shipped rule.

entries.name: --sf-field-required-marker
entries.description: CSS content value for required-field markers (e.g. " *"). Used by pseudo-elements in the .required utility pattern.

entries.name: --sf-flow-space
entries.description: Margin-block-start applied to all flow children except the first.

entries.name: --sf-fluid-max-vw
entries.description: Maximum viewport width (in rem) at which the fluid scale clamps to its largest values. Default 90rem (~1440px). Part of the fluid scale engine.

entries.name: --sf-fluid-min-vw
entries.description: Minimum viewport width (in rem) at which the fluid scale clamps to its smallest values. Default 22.5rem (~360px). Part of the fluid scale engine.

entries.name: --sf-fluid-width
entries.description: Fluid interpolation driver — the length term every fluid clamp() below measures against. Universal syntax ("*") not "<length>": a registered <length> requires a computationally-independent initial-value, and 100vw (viewport-dependent) is not one. The real default lives on…

entries.name: --sf-focus-ring-color
entries.description: Color of the keyboard focus ring. Ensure sufficient contrast against all background surfaces.

entries.name: --sf-focus-ring-offset
entries.description: Gap between the element edge and the focus ring.

entries.name: --sf-focus-ring-shadow
entries.description: Computed box-shadow value for the focus ring — two-layer technique: offset shadow in bg color, then ring shadow in focus-ring color. Tune via --sf-focus-ring-width and --sf-focus-ring-color instead of overriding this directly.
entries.value: 0 0 0 var(--sf-focus-ring-offset) var(--sf-color-bg, var(--sf-color-base-source-light, #fff)), 0 0 0 calc(var(--sf-focus-ring-offset) + var(--sf-focus-ring-width)) var(--sf-focus-ring-color)

entries.name: --sf-focus-ring-style
entries.description: Border style of the focus ring (solid, dashed, dotted).

entries.name: --sf-focus-ring-width
entries.description: Stroke width of the focus ring outline.

entries.name: --sf-font-body
entries.description: Font family stack for body text. Override to set your primary typeface.

entries.name: --sf-font-display
entries.description: Font family for display/marketing text. Override for large headline typefaces.

entries.name: --sf-font-features
entries.description: OpenType feature-settings string for body text (e.g. 'ss01', 'cv11'). Default 'normal'. Override on :root or a subtree to enable ligatures, alternate glyphs, etc.

entries.name: --sf-font-geometric
entries.description: Geometric sans-serif slot — circular letterforms for brand alternates.

entries.name: --sf-font-heading
entries.description: Font family for headings. Defaults to display if not overridden separately.

entries.name: --sf-font-humanist
entries.description: Humanist sans-serif slot — warm, readable alternate typeface.

entries.name: --sf-font-mono
entries.description: Monospace font family for code, pre, and kbd elements.

entries.name: --sf-font-numeric
entries.description: font-variant-numeric shorthand (e.g. tabular-nums) for aligned numeric data.

entries.name: --sf-font-slab
entries.description: Slab-serif slot for editorial or display headings.

entries.name: --sf-font-variation
entries.description: Variable-font axis settings for body text (e.g. "wght" 450). Default 'normal'. Override on :root or a subtree to activate variable-font axes.

entries.name: --sf-font-weight-body
entries.description: Font weight for body text (typically 400 / normal).

entries.name: --sf-font-weight-bold
entries.description: Strong emphasis weight (700).

entries.name: --sf-font-weight-display
entries.description: Font weight for display-size text.

entries.name: --sf-font-weight-heading
entries.description: Font weight for headings (typically 600–700).

entries.name: --sf-font-weight-interactive
entries.description: Font weight for interactive role text — buttons, badges, and navigation labels. Defaults to semibold.

entries.name: --sf-font-weight-light
entries.description: Light weight (300). Use sparingly — check contrast at small sizes.

entries.name: --sf-font-weight-medium
entries.description: Medium weight (500). Subtle emphasis without full bold.

entries.name: --sf-font-weight-normal
entries.description: Normal / regular weight (400).

entries.name: --sf-font-weight-semibold
entries.description: Semibold weight (600). Common for labels and subheadings.

entries.name: --sf-font-weight-strong
entries.description: Font weight for strong/emphasis inline role. Defaults to bold.

entries.name: --sf-frame-ratio
entries.description: Aspect ratio for the frame (media container) layout.

entries.name: --sf-gap
entries.description: Default gap between components (the loose rhythm). Layout primitives like cluster/grid/sidebar default to it. Override globally to retune them all at once, or set a primitive token (e.g. --sf-cluster-gap) for one element.

entries.name: --sf-gradient-action
entries.description: Gradient using action palette colors (light to saturated). Core-4 parity with the primary/secondary/tertiary gradients; drives the default .sf-btn--gradient fill.
entries.value: linear-gradient(in oklch 135deg, var(--sf-color-action), oklch(from var(--sf-color-action) calc(l - 0.08) c h))

entries.name: --sf-gradient-brand
entries.description: Multi-stop brand gradient spanning primary and secondary palette colors. Use for hero backgrounds and brand accents.
entries.value: linear-gradient(in oklch 135deg, var(--sf-color-primary), oklch(from var(--sf-color-primary) l c calc(h + 30)))

entries.name: --sf-gradient-fade--b
entries.description: Fade-to-bottom gradient (transparent → surface). Use to fade content into a background below (infinite scroll fade, content cutoff).
entries.value: linear-gradient(in oklch to bottom, transparent, var(--sf-color-bg))

entries.name: --sf-gradient-fade--l
entries.description: Fade-to-left gradient. Use to indicate left-side scrollable overflow.
entries.value: linear-gradient(in oklch to left, transparent, var(--sf-color-bg))

entries.name: --sf-gradient-fade--r
entries.description: Fade-to-right gradient. Use to indicate right-side scrollable overflow.
entries.value: linear-gradient(in oklch to right, transparent, var(--sf-color-bg))

entries.name: --sf-gradient-fade--t
entries.description: Fade-to-top gradient (transparent → surface). Use to fade content into a background above.
entries.value: linear-gradient(in oklch to top, transparent, var(--sf-color-bg))

entries.name: --sf-gradient-primary
entries.description: Gradient using primary palette colors (light to saturated).
entries.value: linear-gradient(in oklch 135deg, var(--sf-color-primary), oklch(from var(--sf-color-primary) calc(l - 0.08) c h))

entries.name: --sf-gradient-secondary
entries.description: Gradient using secondary palette colors.
entries.value: linear-gradient(in oklch 135deg, var(--sf-color-secondary), oklch(from var(--sf-color-secondary) calc(l - 0.08) c h))

entries.name: --sf-gradient-surface
entries.description: Subtle surface-color gradient for depth layering and glass effects.

entries.name: --sf-gradient-tertiary
entries.description: Gradient using tertiary palette colors.
entries.value: linear-gradient(in oklch 135deg, var(--sf-color-tertiary), oklch(from var(--sf-color-tertiary) calc(l - 0.08) c h))

entries.name: --sf-grid-gap
entries.description: Gap between auto-fill grid cells.

entries.name: --sf-grid-min
entries.description: Minimum column width for the auto-fill grid.

entries.name: --sf-grid-min-2xl
entries.description: Minimum column width at the 2× breakpoint.

entries.name: --sf-grid-min-l
entries.description: Large minimum column width for the auto-fill grid.

entries.name: --sf-grid-min-m
entries.description: Medium minimum column width for the auto-fill grid.

entries.name: --sf-grid-min-s
entries.description: Small minimum column width for the auto-fill grid.

entries.name: --sf-grid-min-xl
entries.description: Extra-large minimum column width for the auto-fill grid. Use for wide content cards.

entries.name: --sf-grid-min-xs
entries.description: Extra-small minimum column width for the auto-fill grid. Use for very compact tile layouts (icon grids).

entries.name: --sf-gutter
entries.description: Wide page/section-edge gutter (used by center/container). Override to set the page-edge breathing room across breakpoints.

entries.name: --sf-h1-font-weight
entries.description: Font weight for <h1>.

entries.name: --sf-h1-letter-spacing
entries.description: Letter-spacing for <h1>. Typically slightly negative at large sizes.

entries.name: --sf-h1-line-height
entries.description: Line height for <h1>. Tighter than body to avoid excessive whitespace at large sizes.

entries.name: --sf-h1-max-width
entries.description: Max-inline-size cap for <h1>. Default none (unconstrained). Set to a ch value (e.g. 20ch) to prevent wide headings from spanning the full column on large screens.

entries.name: --sf-h1-size
entries.description: Font size for <h1>.

entries.name: --sf-h2-font-weight
entries.description: Font weight for <h2>.

entries.name: --sf-h2-letter-spacing
entries.description: Letter-spacing for <h2>.

entries.name: --sf-h2-line-height
entries.description: Line height for <h2>.

entries.name: --sf-h2-max-width
entries.description: Max-inline-size cap for <h2>. Default none.

entries.name: --sf-h2-size
entries.description: Font size for <h2>.

entries.name: --sf-h3-font-weight
entries.description: Font weight for <h3>.

entries.name: --sf-h3-letter-spacing
entries.description: Letter-spacing for <h3>.

entries.name: --sf-h3-line-height
entries.description: Line height for <h3>.

entries.name: --sf-h3-max-width
entries.description: Max-inline-size cap for <h3>. Default none.

entries.name: --sf-h3-size
entries.description: Font size for <h3>.

entries.name: --sf-h4-font-weight
entries.description: Font weight for <h4>.

entries.name: --sf-h4-letter-spacing
entries.description: Letter-spacing for <h4>.

entries.name: --sf-h4-line-height
entries.description: Line height for <h4>.

entries.name: --sf-h4-max-width
entries.description: Max-inline-size cap for <h4>. Default none.

entries.name: --sf-h4-size
entries.description: Font size for <h4>.

entries.name: --sf-h5-font-weight
entries.description: Font weight for <h5>.

entries.name: --sf-h5-letter-spacing
entries.description: Letter-spacing for <h5>.

entries.name: --sf-h5-line-height
entries.description: Line height for <h5>.

entries.name: --sf-h5-max-width
entries.description: Max-inline-size cap for <h5>. Default none.

entries.name: --sf-h5-size
entries.description: Font size for <h5>.

entries.name: --sf-h6-font-weight
entries.description: Font weight for <h6>.

entries.name: --sf-h6-letter-spacing
entries.description: Letter-spacing for <h6>.

entries.name: --sf-h6-line-height
entries.description: Line height for <h6>.

entries.name: --sf-h6-max-width
entries.description: Max-inline-size cap for <h6>. Default none.

entries.name: --sf-h6-size
entries.description: Font size for <h6>.

entries.name: --sf-header-height
entries.description: Total height of the sticky page header. Used by --sf-sticky-offset to prevent content from hiding under it.
entries.value: clamp( var(--sf-header-height-mobile), calc((var(--sf-header-height-desktop) - var(--sf-header-height-mobile)) / ((var(--sf-fluid-max-vw) - var(--sf-fluid-min-vw)) * 1rem) * (100vw - var(--sf-fluid-min-vw) * 1rem) + var(--sf-header-height-mobile)), var(--sf-header-height-desktop))

entries.name: --sf-header-height-desktop
entries.description: Header height at desktop breakpoints.

entries.name: --sf-header-height-mobile
entries.description: Header height at mobile breakpoints.

entries.name: --sf-heading-color
entries.description: Text color for all headings (h1–h6). Alias of --sf-color-heading.

entries.name: --sf-heading-font-family
entries.description: Font family for all headings. Alias of --sf-font-heading.

entries.name: --sf-heading-text-wrap
entries.description: text-wrap for headings. 'balance' prevents orphaned short last lines in multi-line headings.

entries.name: --sf-hover-grow-scale
entries.description: Scale factor applied by .sf-hover-grow on hover (>1 grows).

entries.name: --sf-hover-lift
entries.description: Translate distance for .sf-hover-float (up) and .sf-hover-sink (down) on hover.

entries.name: --sf-hover-shrink-scale
entries.description: Scale factor applied by .sf-hover-shrink on hover (<1 shrinks).

entries.name: --sf-hover-slide
entries.description: Translate distance for .sf-hover-slide-start / .sf-hover-slide-end on hover.

entries.name: --sf-icon-2xl
entries.description: 2× large icon size (~40px+). Hero or onboarding icons.

entries.name: --sf-icon-box-bg
entries.description: Background color for boxed icon containers.

entries.name: --sf-icon-box-border
entries.description: Border for boxed icon containers.

entries.name: --sf-icon-box-pad
entries.description: Padding inside boxed icon containers.

entries.name: --sf-icon-box-radius
entries.description: Border radius for boxed icon containers.

entries.name: --sf-icon-l
entries.description: Large icon size (~24px). Standalone icon buttons.

entries.name: --sf-icon-m
entries.description: Medium icon size (~20px). Default for inline and button icons.

entries.name: --sf-icon-s
entries.description: Small icon size (~16px). Dense UI chrome.

entries.name: --sf-icon-xl
entries.description: Extra-large icon size (~32px). Feature icons.

entries.name: --sf-icon-xs
entries.description: Extra-small icon size (~12px). Inline indicators.

entries.name: --sf-imposter-margin
entries.description: Margin between the imposter overlay and the viewport edges.

entries.name: --sf-is-active
entries.description: Integer state flag for the active state. Set to 1 (via JS or .sf-is-active) to drive branching calc() expressions. 0 = default (inactive).

entries.name: --sf-is-current
entries.description: Integer state flag for the current/selected state. Set to 1 (via .sf-is-current) to drive branching calc() expressions. 0 = default.

entries.name: --sf-is-dark
entries.description: Mode flag — 0 in light mode, 1 in dark mode. Set automatically by [data-theme='dark'] and prefers-color-scheme. Drives dark-mode formula branches in calc().

entries.name: --sf-is-open
entries.description: Integer state flag for the open/expanded state. Set to 1 (via .sf-is-open) to drive branching calc() expressions. 0 = default (closed).

entries.name: --sf-is-pressed
entries.description: Integer state flag for the pressed state. Set to 1 (via .sf-is-pressed) to drive branching calc() expressions. 0 = default.

entries.name: --sf-leading-normal
entries.description: Normal line height (~1.5). Default for body text.

entries.name: --sf-leading-relaxed
entries.description: Relaxed line height (~1.65). Long-form reading text.

entries.name: --sf-leading-snug
entries.description: Snug line height (~1.35). Use for sub-headings.

entries.name: --sf-leading-taper
entries.description: Progressive leading tightener: each step up the type scale subtracts step-index × taper from its per-size line-height token. Default 0 keeps the curated defaults.

entries.name: --sf-leading-tight
entries.description: Tight line height (~1.2). Use for large display headings.

entries.name: --sf-line-clamp
entries.description: Number of visible lines before text is clipped with an ellipsis.

entries.name: --sf-link-external-label
entries.description: Accessible name for the .sf-link-external marker glyph, read by screen readers via the CSS content alt-text syntax. Localise or clear alongside --sf-link-external-marker.
entries.value: "opens in a new window or external site"

entries.name: --sf-link-external-marker
entries.description: CSS content value appended to external links (e.g. " ↗"). Used by the .external-link pseudo-element pattern.

entries.name: --sf-link-underline-offset
entries.description: Vertical offset of the link underline from the text baseline.

entries.name: --sf-link-underline-thickness
entries.description: Stroke width of the link underline.

entries.name: --sf-lumlocker
entries.description: OKLCH lightness lock value. When :root has [data-lumlocker], brand colors (primary, secondary, action, base) are remapped to this L so their contrast remains constant as hues shift.

entries.name: --sf-mask-scrim-end
entries.description: End stop for edge-fade mask gradients. Mirrors --sf-mask-scrim-start for the trailing edge of a scroll container.

entries.name: --sf-mask-scrim-start
entries.description: Start stop for edge-fade mask gradients on scroll reels / overflow containers. Use in mask-image: linear-gradient(..., transparent var(--sf-mask-scrim-start)) to fade content near the leading edge.

entries.name: --sf-media-radius
entries.description: Radius + space: <length> syntax enables CSS transitions on layout values — border-radius/padding/gap etc. now interpolate instead of snapping. Shadow: syntax:"*" (no <shadow> type in spec); inherits:true so :root values cascade normally; registers the properties formally for…

entries.name: --sf-motion-scale
entries.description: Global motion multiplier. All transition and animation durations multiply by this factor. Set to 0 to disable all motion; reduce below 1 for snappier feel.

entries.name: --sf-object-fit
entries.description: Default object-fit value for replaced elements (img, video).

entries.name: --sf-object-position
entries.description: Default object-position for replaced elements.

entries.name: --sf-opacity-disabled
entries.description: Opacity for disabled UI elements (typically 0.4–0.5).

entries.name: --sf-opacity-muted
entries.description: General de-emphasis opacity for secondary content, ghost elements, or non-primary layers. Default 0.5.

entries.name: --sf-optical-sizing
entries.description: CSS font-optical-sizing value. 'auto' lets the browser optimize letterforms for the rendered size. Set 'none' to disable optical sizing.

entries.name: --sf-overlap-pull
entries.description: how far .sf-overlap pulls into the adjacent element. .sf-overlap-host's padding compensation defaults to this same value via a var() fallback in the rule itself (not aliased here — see core/macros.css), so one override on the host tunes both unless --sf-overlap-host-pad is set…

entries.name: --sf-palette-mix-100
entries.description: Color-mix percentage for palette step 100. Controls blend depth toward the surface. Default 8%.

entries.name: --sf-palette-mix-200
entries.description: Color-mix percentage for palette step 200. Controls blend depth toward the surface. Default 20%.

entries.name: --sf-palette-mix-300
entries.description: Color-mix percentage for palette step 300. Controls blend depth toward the surface. Default 40%.

entries.name: --sf-palette-mix-400
entries.description: Color-mix percentage for palette step 400 (near-mid tint). Controls blend depth. Default 65%.

entries.name: --sf-palette-mix-50
entries.description: Color-mix percentage for the lightest palette step (50). Controls how far step 50 blends toward the surface. Default 4%.

entries.name: --sf-palette-mix-600
entries.description: Color-mix percentage for palette step 600 (near-mid shade). Controls blend depth toward the text color. Default 82%.

entries.name: --sf-palette-mix-700
entries.description: Color-mix percentage for palette step 700. Controls blend depth toward the text color. Default 62%.

entries.name: --sf-palette-mix-800
entries.description: Color-mix percentage for palette step 800 (dark shade). Controls blend depth toward text. Default 38%.

entries.name: --sf-palette-mix-900
entries.description: Color-mix percentage for palette step 900 (very dark shade). Controls blend depth toward text. Default 18%.

entries.name: --sf-palette-mix-950
entries.description: Color-mix percentage for the darkest palette step (950). Controls how far step 950 blends toward the text color. Default 8%.

entries.name: --sf-print-base-size
entries.description: Base font size for @media print stylesheets. Default 11pt. Override on :root to adjust printed body text size.

entries.name: --sf-print-page-margin
entries.description: Page margin for printed output. Default 2cm. Maps to @page margin.

entries.name: --sf-print-page-size
entries.description: Target paper size for printing. Default 'a4'. Maps to @page size. Common values: a4, letter, legal.

entries.name: --sf-prose-block-margin
entries.description: Block margin between prose elements (h2, p, ul, etc.).

entries.name: --sf-prose-blockquote-border
entries.description: Left border style for blockquotes inside prose.

entries.name: --sf-prose-blockquote-padding
entries.description: Inner padding for blockquotes inside prose.

entries.name: --sf-prose-figcaption-size
entries.description: Font size for figure captions inside .prose. Typically smaller than body text.

entries.name: --sf-prose-figure-margin
entries.description: Block margin around <figure> elements inside .prose.

entries.name: --sf-prose-heading-gap
entries.description: Space between a heading and the content that follows it inside .prose.

entries.name: --sf-prose-hr-margin
entries.description: Block margin around <hr> rules inside .prose.

entries.name: --sf-prose-list-gap
entries.description: Gap between list items inside .prose.

entries.name: --sf-prose-marker-color
entries.description: Color of list bullets and ordered-list numbers inside .prose.

entries.name: --sf-prose-media-margin
entries.description: Block margin around images, video, and figures inside .prose.

entries.name: --sf-prose-media-radius
entries.description: Border radius applied to images and media inside .prose.

entries.name: --sf-prose-nested-list-gap
entries.description: Gap between items in nested lists inside .prose.

entries.name: --sf-prose-paragraph
entries.description: Max width of prose paragraphs (layout token for the prose layout).

entries.name: --sf-prose-table-pad
entries.description: Cell padding for tables inside .prose.

entries.name: --sf-radius-2xl
entries.description: 2× large radius (~20px). Rounded card variants.

entries.name: --sf-radius-2xs
entries.description: Extra-extra-small radius (~1px). Minimal rounding for very tight UI elements.

entries.name: --sf-radius-3xl
entries.description: 3× large radius (~24px). Large rounded surfaces.

entries.name: --sf-radius-4xl
entries.description: 4× large radius (~32px). Near-pill rounding.

entries.name: --sf-radius-full
entries.description: Full rounding (50%). For circular elements like avatars.

entries.name: --sf-radius-l
entries.description: Large radius (~12px). Modals, popovers, panels.

entries.name: --sf-radius-m
entries.description: Medium radius (~6–8px). Default — inputs, standard buttons, cards.

entries.name: --sf-radius-none
entries.description: Zero border radius — square corners.

entries.name: --sf-radius-outer
entries.description: Concentric corner helper: outer radius for a container that wraps content with inner radius of --sf-radius-m. Computed as --sf-radius-m + --sf-component-pad so corners align visually.

entries.name: --sf-radius-pill
entries.description: Pill rounding (9999px). Tags, toggle pills, status badges.

entries.name: --sf-radius-s
entries.description: Small radius (~4px). Badges, chips, small buttons.

entries.name: --sf-radius-scale
entries.description: Global border-radius multiplier. Scales the entire radius ramp up (>1) or down (<1) from one knob. Set to 0 for sharp corners everywhere.

entries.name: --sf-radius-xl
entries.description: Extra-large radius (~16px). Prominent cards and feature blocks.

entries.name: --sf-radius-xs
entries.description: Hairline radius (~2px). Subtle rounding for tight components.

entries.name: --sf-ratio-3-2
entries.description: 3:2 aspect ratio. Common for landscape photography.

entries.name: --sf-ratio-4-3
entries.description: 4:3 aspect ratio. Classic screen ratio.

entries.name: --sf-ratio-cinema
entries.description: 2.39:1 cinematic widescreen aspect ratio.

entries.name: --sf-ratio-golden
entries.description: 1.618:1 golden ratio. Harmonious proportions.

entries.name: --sf-ratio-portrait
entries.description: 2:3 portrait aspect ratio.

entries.name: --sf-ratio-square
entries.description: 1:1 square aspect ratio. Use for avatars, icon containers, and square thumbnails.

entries.name: --sf-ratio-video
entries.description: 16:9 widescreen video aspect ratio. Use for video embeds and video-thumbnail containers.

entries.name: --sf-reel-gap
entries.description: Gap between items in the horizontal reel.

entries.name: --sf-reel-height
entries.description: Fixed height of the reel container.

entries.name: --sf-reel-item-width
entries.description: Width of each item in the reel.

entries.name: --sf-safe-bottom
entries.description: Device safe-area inset at the bottom edge (home indicator, gesture bar). Resolves to env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px). Use for fixed footers.

entries.name: --sf-safe-left
entries.description: Device safe-area inset at the left edge. Resolves to env(safe-area-inset-left, 0px).

entries.name: --sf-safe-right
entries.description: Device safe-area inset at the right edge (rounded corners, home indicator). Resolves to env(safe-area-inset-right, 0px).

entries.name: --sf-safe-top
entries.description: Device safe-area inset at the top edge (notch, Dynamic Island). Resolves to env(safe-area-inset-top, 0px). Use for fixed headers on notched devices.

entries.name: --sf-scrim-color
entries.description: Base color of the gradient scrim overlay.

entries.name: --sf-scrim-direction
entries.description: Direction of the scrim gradient (to bottom, to top, etc.).

entries.name: --sf-scrim-gradient
entries.description: Full gradient shorthand for the scrim. Override to customise the fade.

entries.name: --sf-scrim-text-shadow
entries.description: Text-shadow layered over the scrim gradient to ensure legibility for text placed directly on image backgrounds.

entries.name: --sf-scroll-shadow-size
entries.description: Size of the scroll-shadow fade effect on overflowing containers.

entries.name: --sf-scroll-timeline-range-end
entries.description: animation-range end value for scroll-driven entrance effects. Default 'cover 30%'. Override on an element to control when its entrance animation finishes.

entries.name: --sf-scroll-timeline-range-exit-end
entries.description: Scroll-timeline range at which a scroll-out exit animation finishes. Default: exit 100%.

entries.name: --sf-scroll-timeline-range-exit-start
entries.description: Scroll-timeline range at which a scroll-out exit animation begins. Default: cover 70%.

entries.name: --sf-scroll-timeline-range-start
entries.description: animation-range start value for scroll-driven entrance effects. Default 'entry 0%'. Override on an element to control when its entrance animation begins.

entries.name: --sf-scrollbar-thumb
entries.description: Color of the custom scrollbar thumb.

entries.name: --sf-scrollbar-track
entries.description: Color of the custom scrollbar track.

entries.name: --sf-section-pad
entries.description: Default vertical padding for full-width page sections.

entries.name: --sf-section-pad--2xl
entries.description: 2× large section vertical padding for hero areas.

entries.name: --sf-section-pad--l
entries.description: Large section vertical padding.

entries.name: --sf-section-pad--m
entries.description: Medium section vertical padding.

entries.name: --sf-section-pad--s
entries.description: Small section vertical padding.

entries.name: --sf-section-pad--xl
entries.description: Extra-large vertical section padding for hero and feature sections.

entries.name: --sf-section-pad--xs
entries.description: Extra-small vertical section padding for compact in-page modules.

entries.name: --sf-section-scale
entries.description: Global multiplier applied to every --sf-section-pad--* size — one dial re-rhythms all section padding (default 1).

entries.description: Largest shadow for hero cards, feature highlights, and marketing surfaces.

entries.name: --sf-shadow-color
entries.description: Near-black shadow tint derived from the neutral palette. Inherits the neutral's chroma and hue so colorless neutrals produce colorless shadows.

entries.name: --sf-shadow-glow
entries.description: Glow box-shadow shorthand for decorative glow effects.
entries.value: 0 0 15px 2px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-glow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 2), 0.7))

entries.name: --sf-shadow-glow-color
entries.description: Ambient glow tint used by --sf-shadow-glow. Override to retint all glow shadows; opacity and dark-mode boost are controlled by --sf-shadow-strength.

entries.name: --sf-shadow-inner
entries.description: Inset shadow for pressed states, inset inputs, and recessed surfaces.
entries.value: inset 0 2px 4px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 2), 0.7))

entries.description: OKLCH lightness component of the shadow color. Lower = denser-looking shadows. Tune this independently of --sf-shadow-strength to control tonal weight without affecting opacity.

entries.description: Medium shadow for cards and content panels.

entries.name: --sf-shadow-none
entries.description: No box-shadow (resets inherited shadows). Use to explicitly remove elevation.

entries.name: --sf-shadow-s

entries.name: --sf-shadow-xl

entries.name: --sf-shadow-xs
entries.description: Extra-small shadow for barely-elevated elements (focused inputs, small chips).
entries.value: 0 1px 2px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 0.5), 0.7))

entries.name: --sf-sidebar-gap
entries.description: Gap between sidebar and main content column.

entries.name: --sf-sidebar-min-width
entries.description: Minimum sidebar width before the layout collapses to stacking.

entries.name: --sf-sidebar-width
entries.description: Preferred width of the sidebar column.

entries.name: --sf-size-l
entries.description: Large UI component height (~48px). Touch-friendly interactive elements.

entries.name: --sf-size-m

entries.name: --sf-size-s
entries.description: Small UI component height (~32px). Compact buttons and input variants.

entries.name: --sf-size-xl
entries.description: Extra-large interactive component height (~56px). For oversized or prominently touch-friendly controls.

entries.name: --sf-size-xs
entries.description: Extra-small interactive component height (~24px). For very compact inline elements and micro-controls.
